summary: The diff implements all three requirements (REQ-10, REQ-11, REQ-12) with high fidelity. The products.ts data file adds the Car Care Kit Box bundle with correct pricing, included products, and image reference. The ProductCard component is extended to support bundle variants with BUNDLE DEAL badge, strikethrough pricing, savings ribbon, and included products checklist. The Products.tsx page adds a dedicated Bundle & Save section. The image file addition is not visible in the diff (no new files listed), which raises a concern about REQ-12's image asset.

missing_requirements.requirement: Generate a product bundle image car-care-kit-box.dim_600x600.png and serve it from frontend/public/assets/generated/
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows no new files added (ADDED FILES: none). The image file frontend/public/assets/generated/car-care-kit-box.dim_600x600.png is referenced in products.ts but is not present in the added files list, so it may not have been created.
